tonight_tidbit.text: Bryce Harper won the 2018 Home Run Derby at Nationals Park. He hit nineteen in the final round. The crowd did not sit down.

notable_injuries.description: Herz (elbow) was sent to the FCL Nationals on Friday to begin a rehab assignment.
Williams (elbow) threw a simulated game at Nationals Park ahead of Tuesday's loss to the Marlins, MLB.com reports.
Nationals manager Blake Butera said Monday that Irvin (shoulder) remains shut down from throwing, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Nationals transferred Kranick (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Monday.
Gray (elbow) has resumed a throwing program, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Nationals transferred Waldichuk (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Thursday.
